creator: rafan@FreeBSD.org
text:
I guess you have devel/ncurses installed. Remove that and python 2.4
can be built just fine. In my test, both 2.4.3 and 2.4.4 failed if
devel/ncurses is installed.=20

That's just an workaround. There were some discussion on -ports@ last
week or so.

Regards,
Rong-En Fan
